arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt vs Bayer Leverkusen preview: Visitors must win to keep title hopes alive
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen aim to keep their slim title hopes alive on Saturday evening, as they take on Eintracht Frankfurt.

arts.ttl: Alonso has no plans to rest players ahead of Bayern clash
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen coach Xabi Alonso says he has no plans to rotate his squad heavily against Eintracht Frankfurt with the midweek Champions League clash against Bayern Munich in mind.

arts.ttl: Eintracht Frankfurt set a price tag worth at least €60m on midfielder Hugo Larsson

arts.ttl: The future of both Lukas Hradecky and Matej Kovar at Bayer Leverkusen up in the air

arts.ttl: Bayer Leverkusen's Patrik Schick on battling Bayern Munich, form, fitness and more
arts.sum: Back to his very best with 21 competitive goals already this season, Patrik Schick is leading the charge for Bayer Leverkusen as they look to retain their Bundesliga title in a rivalry with Bayern Munich that will now spill over into the UEFA Champions League. I scored a lot of goals for Leverkusen, and we won the Bundesliga, the DFB Cup and the Supercup, and we are in the Champions League .”

arts.ttl: ‘Moving the most’ – Arsenal lined up for transfer scuffle with Bayer Leverkusen
arts.sum: Arsenal are still chasing Espanyol goalkeeper Joan García after failing to sign him last summer. On Thursday, AS stated there’s a good a chance for the 23-year-old to join the Gunners in the summer window. Later that day, Marca reported Barcelona are making moves to sign the player desired by Arsenal. arts.ttl: Report: Kovar set to be Leverkusen's first choice shot-stopper next season
